tools.name: Web Search
tools.description: Search the web and return summarized results. Great for answering questions about current events.

tools.name: Filesystem Access
tools.description: Read and list files from a sandboxed directory. Lets the agent inspect local documents.

tools.name: GitHub
tools.description: Search repos, read issues, and create PRs through the GitHub API.

skills.name: Document Summarizer
skills.description: Condense long documents into concise bullet-point summaries with key takeaways.
skills.author: BizlinAI
skills.promptTemplate: You are a summarization expert. Read the provided document and produce: (1) a 3-sentence overview, (2) 5 key bullet points, (3) action items if any. Be concise and faithful to the source.

skills.name: Code Reviewer
skills.description: Review code changes for bugs, style, and security issues. Outputs structured feedback.
skills.author: BizlinAI
skills.promptTemplate: You are a senior code reviewer. Analyze the given diff and report findings grouped by: Bugs, Security, Style, Suggestions. Reference file:line for each finding. Be specific and constructive.

skills.name: Web Researcher
skills.description: Research a topic across multiple searches and synthesize a cited report.
skills.author: BizlinAI
skills.promptTemplate: You are a research assistant. Break the question into 3-5 sub-queries, search each, then synthesize a report with citations. Flag uncertainty and conflicting sources explicitly.

mcps.name: Filesystem MCP
mcps.description: Official Model Context Protocol server for local filesystem access. Desktop only (stdio).

mcps.name: Brave Search MCP
mcps.description: Web and local search via the Brave Search API. Requires a Brave API key passed in headers.

mcps.name: GitHub MCP
mcps.description: Interact with GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests.

mcps.name: Memory MCP
mcps.description: Persistent key-value memory store so agents can recall context across sessions.

providers.name: OpenAI
providers.description: GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, o-series and more. The reference OpenAI API.

providers.name: Groq
providers.description: Ultra-low-latency inference for Llama, Mixtral and Gemma models.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.description: Unified gateway to 200+ models from many providers with one key.

providers.name: Ollama (local)
providers.description: Run models locally via Ollama. No API key required. Use the Ollama discovery page to find models on your network.

models.description: Google Gemma 2B instruct-tuned model. Lightweight, fast, good for general chat on mobile. Requires HuggingFace auth (gated).
Google Gemma 3 Nano E2B instruct-tuned. Multimodal (text + image). Requires HuggingFace auth (gated repo).
Google Gemma 3 Nano E4B instruct-tuned. Larger, more capable. Multimodal (text + image). Requires HuggingFace auth (gated repo).
Google Gemma 4 E2B instruct-tuned. Next-gen with thinking mode and function calling. LiteRT-LM format.
Google Gemma 4 E4B instruct-tuned. Larger next-gen model with thinking mode and function calling. LiteRT-LM format.
DeepSeek R1 distilled Qwen 1.5B. Compact reasoning model. LiteRT-LM format.
Microsoft Phi-3 Mini 4K instruct. Small but capable model. LiteRT-LM format.
